build_name: Sanguine Detonation — Optimized for Maps Tier 7-10
build_philosophy: Max life triple-dip (defense + fuel + damage via Gore Spike). Aggressive crit scaling post-15% base (Sunder). Despair curse effect as hidden multiplier. Flask recovery replaces leech post-0.5 nerfs.

ascendancy_allocation.node_1_2_effect: Spell Critical Strike Chance: 15% (base for all spells)
ascendancy_allocation.node_3_4_effect: Gain X% of Critical Damage as Extra Damage per X of Maximum Life
ascendancy_allocation.node_5_6_effect: Enemies you curse have X% of Life Reserved. Cursed enemies cannot regenerate.
ascendancy_allocation.node_7_8_effect: Energy Shield on Body Armour counts as Extra Maximum Life

supports.reason: Multiplies 15% base crit; first link mandatory
Scales crit damage; stacks with Gore Spike
Widens curse + explosion chain; pack clear
Trade crit chance for damage; patch-dependent swap
Curse whole pack in one cast

despair_setup.note: Optional second variant: Despair + Curse Duration (long bosses)

supports: Faster Attacks Support or Second Wind (if using Second Wind)

utility_buff.reason: Grants flat chaos to spells (scales Hexblast high added-damage effectiveness)

rare_example_mods: +22 to Added Chaos Damage to Spells
weapon.reason: Highest damage leverage; flat chaos scales with high added-damage effectiveness

body_armour.alternative_unique: The Covenant (if thematic; judge vs. rare)
body_armour.reason: Life is triple-dip; resistances cap to 75%+

helmet.reason: Crit chance helps floor; life + resistances

gloves.reason: Cast speed is QoL; life + resistances

boots.reason: Movement speed NON-NEGOTIABLE; time between casts = danger zone

rare_example_mods: +12 to Added Chaos Damage to Spells
+15 to Added Chaos Damage to Spells
+16 to Added Chaos Damage to Spells
amulet.reason: Crit multiplier scales exponentially; life + damage

crit_clusters: Spell crit cluster (left): +38% spell critical strike chance
defensive_clusters: Flask recovery cluster: +48% flask recovery rate

offence.spell_damage_multiplier: 2.15× (65% spell + 80% crit multiplier + Gore Spike + supports)
offence.despair_multiplier: ~2.5-3.0× (base −30% res, deepened by +28% curse effect, reduction past 0% compounds)

per_hit_calc.note: Numbers are estimators; actual PoB2 numbers may vary ±10-15%

damage_calculation_breakdown.breakpoint: At 1650 life, Gore Spike contributes ~110-140% crit damage bonus (patch-dependent). Combined with multiplier support (38%) + tree (82%), total crit multiplier hits ~180-190%.

playstyle_notes.pack_clear: Despair hits whole pack; Hexblast chains up to 10 explosions per patch
playstyle_notes.single_target: Despair → Hexblast → Hexblast (if mana allows); optional second Despair (duration variant) for long fights
playstyle_notes.survivability: Life reservoir absorbs several casts + one hit. Flask is primary sustain layer (50% HP recovery). Remnants overflow life for Gore Spike damage burst. Time between casts is danger zone—movement speed critical.
playstyle_notes.patch_sensitivity: Numbers (gem values, supports, explosion caps) shift per patch. Reasoning (why life scales, why curse matters, why crit is the multiplier) is stable.

next_upgrade_targets.target: Body armour → higher life roll (170+) if ES upgrades max

late_endgame_pivots: Gem quality: +1-2 quality supports = minor DPS
Unique swap: The Covenant if ES rolls are exceptional (judge vs. rare)

required_for_upload: Path of Building 2 (PoB2) export code (base64 string)
Full skill gem setup (6-link Hexblast + 2-link Despair + supports)
Gear (rares as specified above, or substitutes)
Passive tree allocation (82 points, clusters as described)
Ascendancy: Sunder the Flesh, Gore Spike, Whispers of the Flesh, Crimson Power
pob2_generation_instructions.manual_input_path: If PoB2 code unavailable, manually input in Path of Building 2: Witch → Blood Mage → fill tree + gems as above → export → upload to pobb.in
pob2_generation_instructions.note: This spec is designed to be PoB2-compatible and pobb.in-shareable once exported.

research_references: mods-priority.json: S/A/B tier mods per slot
